title: MCOD
description: This is a Minecraft Call Of Duty  modpack, Have fun
body:
This is a Minecraft Call Of Duty modpack.
this modpack add weapons and militery vehicles.
it's fun to desroy the minecraft world and it's easier to kill entitys.
it' realy realistic but no blood, the settings must be changed to the users interest, like sounds, keybinds, ressource pack and graphic settings.
